differential_diagnoses: Right atrial thrombus (associated with pacemaker lead)
next_steps: 18F-FDG PET-CT to evaluate systemic malignancy and metabolic activity
Ultrasound-guided percutaneous biopsy of the right atrial mass or mediastinal lymph node
Pericardiocentesis with cytologic and flow cytometric analysis of the pericardial fluid
Cardiac MRI for tissue characterization and evaluation of myocardial infiltration
Histopathological examination (core needle biopsy or open biopsy) to confirm diagnosis

differential_diagnoses: Primary cardiac diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
Cardiac involvement by systemic IgG4-related disease
Right atrial thrombus (secondary to pacemaker lead infection/inflammation)
Infective endocarditis with large vegetation and abscess
next_steps: 18F-FDG PET-CT to evaluate systemic metabolic activity and identify optimal biopsy sites
Endobronchial ultrasound-guided (EBUS) needle aspiration of mediastinal lymph nodes for cytology, flow cytometry, and immunohistochemistry
Pericardiocentesis with cytologic analysis and flow cytometry of the pericardial fluid
Cardiac MRI for tissue characterization and to delineate the extent of infiltration and vascularity
Serum analysis for IgG4 levels, LDH, and beta-2 microglobulin
